title: Connect Databricks to on-premises resources using an SSH reverse tunnel
body: You can now connect Databricks classic and serverless compute to on-premises resources without opening inbound firewall access by configuring an SSH reverse tunnel with proxy VMs in AWS. See [Connect to on-premises resources using an SSH reverse tunnel](/aws/en/security/network/serverless-network-security/ssh-reverse-tunnel).

ref_links.text: Connect to on-premises resources using an SSH reverse tunnel
